artifactChecks.description: Evidence artifact must contain at least one item.
Regression result artifact must contain a supported verdict and evidence ids.
Email draft artifact must be grounded in structured verifier inputs.

rules.description: TaskSpec, evidence, and regression result required fields must be present.
Non-unknown verdicts must reference evidence ids that exist in evidence.json.
Regression verdict must match marker precedence rules.
Failure markers cannot be overridden by a passed verdict.
Incomplete markers cannot be converted into a passed verdict.
Warnings or waivers require a review-oriented verdict.
Passed verdicts require explicit all-pass evidence with no conflicts.
Email drafts must cite the structured result, verdict, and evidence ids.
